assertions.text: n == n / a * a + n % a

ensures.text: TotalChocolate(bought, a, b) >= TotalChocolate(bought - 1, a, b)
TotalChocolate(bought, a, b) >= TotalChocolate(bought - 1, a, b)

invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger results[j]} {:trigger cases[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: IsMaxChocolateResult(cases[j].0, cases[j].1, cases[j].2, cases[j].3, results[j])

ensures.text: forall i: int {:trigger results[i]} {:trigger cases[i]} | 0 <= i < t :: IsMaxChocolateResult(cases[i].0, cases[i].1, cases[i].2, cases[i].3, results[i])
forall i: int {:trigger results[i]} {:trigger cases[i]} | 0 <= i < t :: IsMaxChocolateResult(cases[i].0, cases[i].1, cases[i].2, cases[i].3, results[i])

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger cases[i]} | 0 <= i < t :: cases[i].0 >= 0 && cases[i].1 > 0 && cases[i].2 >= 0 && cases[i].3 > 0
forall i: int {:trigger cases[i]} | 0 <= i < t :: cases[i].0 >= 0 && cases[i].1 > 0 && cases[i].2 >= 0 && cases[i].3 > 0
